ef3214f6-bc67-4c2c-a3ae-ab79c9964d33.doc_description: This document provides a comprehensive analysis of CPU performance through exercises on instruction execution, comparing processors based on clock speed and cycles per instruction (CPI), while also covering RISC-V assembly language programming and floating-point representation in IEEE 754 format.

13379236-c79c-493c-8309-e84de2439ef2.doc_description: This document provides a comprehensive overview of the Health Service Procurement (Wales) Act 2024, detailing its amendments to existing procurement legislation, the powers granted to Welsh Ministers, and the framework for enhancing transparency and fairness in the procurement of health services in Wales.
